MASTER CALENDAR COURT

And Notice Ofmotion To Strike Portions Oif Third Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-06-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. DOUGLAS B. PROVENCHER OF PROVENCHER & FLATT LLP, TEL. NO. (707) 284-2380 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. SCOTT A. FREEDMAN OF ZACKS & UTRECHT LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 956-8100 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT WILLIAM BANER.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS : Defendant William Baner's motion to strike portions of the third amended complaint is granted. The following language is therefore deemed stricken from the third amended
complaint for attorney's fees. No opposition was filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)

DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-06-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DOUGLAS B. PROVENCHER OF PROVENCHER & FLATT LLP, TEL. NO. (707) 284-2380 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. SCOTT A. FREEDMAN OF ZACKS & UTRECHT LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 956-8100 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT WILLIAM BANER.

RULING - A R G U E D; Defendant William Baner's demurrer to the third amended complaint is overruled with ten days to answer. The second cause of action is sustained without leave to amend. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077 =302/HEK
